purpose: Evaluate community-curated curricula against a baseline before any learning object or training slice is promoted.

steps.description: Read proposed Curriculum records with prerequisite, exemplar, rubric, license, and lineage fields.
Reject curricula that lack license, lineage, or rubric evidence.
Compare candidate curriculum against baseline using declared rubric and eval metrics.
Emit non-transferable contribution-credit records only for accepted review outcomes.
Emit evaluation report, gate status, and provenance references.

claim_boundary: This workflow is a contract stub only. It does not promote curricula, train models, or create economic/token obligations.
notes: Credit is an audit signal, not a payout or token commitment.
